full_text:
Zuo Zizhangba
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zuo Zizhangba. Name means Zuo with the Long Moustache, killed by Yuan Shao. Zuo Zizhangba was a bandit Zuo Zizhangba lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
